creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(Just a "drive-by" comment)
It might be a good idea to do add iflags/oflags for Linux compatibility; they have an iflags=direct/oflags=direct option, as well as other interesting options for tweaking O_APPEND, O_NONBLOCK, and other O_* flags: https://www.gnu.org/software/coreutils/manual/html_node/dd-invocation.html
